title: Ability to Exclude Specific Users from Viewing a Board
excerpt:

posts.author: Rabbie (Rabbie Jawahir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently in Monday.com CRM, if I want to restrict access to a board for just one specific user, I have to make the board Private and then manually invite all the other users who should have access.

This becomes cumbersome in larger teams. For example, I have a team of 30 users, and I’d like everyone to have access to a board except for one person. Right now, my only option is to:

  • Set the board to private
  • Manually add the other 29 users (or create a separate team to include them)

This feels counterintuitive and adds unnecessary administrative work.
Can we create a feature to exclude a specific user from viewing a board?
